user.title: Connect to Plusnet Hub 2 / BT Smart Hub 2
user.description: Enter the details for your hub. The admin password is printed on the label on the back of your hub.

data_description.host: Default is 192.168.1.254. Change only if you have a custom LAN setup.
data_description.username: The hub username. Leave as 'admin' for most setups.
data_description.password: The admin password printed on the label on the back of your hub.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the hub. Check the IP address and that the hub is online.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the admin password on the label on the back of your hub.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the hub for connected devices (10–3600 seconds). Default: 30.
